reviews.review_title: Feels Fast, Looks Chaotic, Plays Smooth
reviews.review_description: This game really shines once you understand momentum. You start planning your swings, targeting objects mid air, and chaining everything together for massive scores. The city feels alive with destruction opportunities, and the timer adds pressure without ruining the fun. It is one of those experiences where skill progression feels very noticeable after just a few runs
Feels like being a playful superhero causing chaos everywhere. Smashing objects, chasing combos, and racing time makes every run exciting and funny.

Swing and Smash is a fast-paced and highly satisfying VR action game. The movement feels great, and chaining destruction combos is incredibly fun. A perfect arcade-style experience for players who love speed and scoring. And we pretend to be Spider-Man, and that's "ultra fun" 😉
This game is pure fun! Jump, swing, smash everything you see. Simple idea but super addictive

You can use a spider web, which flings you in all directions, to move fast from one checkpoint to another. 

I completed easy mode without a problem. But normal mode is too hard for me. Need more practice for that one.
Everything is quick and exciting. Swing, smash, repeat! Simple gameplay but very enjoyable. Great game
Swing, smash and just keep moving
